name: TransUnion TruValidate
description: TruValidate (which combined iovation, Neustar and TransUnion data) provides a fraud and identity decisioning API stack including device reputation, phone intelligence, document verification and transaction monitoring for financial services

seo.title: TransUnion TruValidate — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: TransUnion TruValidate: TruValidate (which combined iovation, Neustar and TransUnion data) provides a fraud and identity decisioning API stack including device

when_to_use: Device reputation scoring for financial services login risk
Phone intelligence API for account verification enrichment
Document verification fusion for identity proofing at banks
Transaction monitoring with iovation device history signals
Multi-signal fraud decisioning for digital banking channels

pros: Combines iovation, Neustar and TransUnion data
Breadth across device, phone and document
cons: Legacy integrations show in several modules
Not as dev-friendly as modern competitors
review.verdict: Broad identity and fraud coverage for financial services, but integration and UX reflect its acquisition past.
review.best_for: Banks and lenders wanting a single bureau-backed stack across device, phone and document fraud.
review.not_for: Startups that want lightweight, modern APIs and self-serve pricing.
